name: Effective Zero-shot Classification with Hundreds of Multi-modal CLIPs
snippet:
CLIP is a multi-modal model that bridges the gap between images and text, showing remarkable zero-shot inference power and image-text retrieval capabilities.
CLIP is a multi-modal model that bridges the gap between images and text, showing remarkable zero-shot inference power and image-text retrieval capabilities. However, it remains a weaker classifier compared to fine-tuned CLIP on downstream task datasets.
